title: Governador Valadares、MG — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Governador Valadares、MGの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Governador ValadaresはMGにある人口281,046の都市です。A major city in eastern Minas Gerais along the Doce River, known for its gemstone trade and as a hub for Brazilian emigrants abroad.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
